seo.title: LAMON-DIY | Landscape Architect Portfolio
seo.description: Portfolio of a dynamic, modern landscape architect specializing in sustainable and premium designs.

hero.title: Shaping
hero.subtitle: Landscape Architecture & Object Design Studio
hero.credibilityLine: Landscape Design  •  Garden Architecture  •  Furniture & Lighting

about.title: Design
paragraphs: We work across every scale of the landscape — from the quiet intimacy of a balcony garden to the ambitious sweep of a public park. Each project begins with the same question: how should this space make you feel?

Our practice extends beyond the ground plane. We design furniture, lighting, and objects born from the same principles that shape our landscapes — natural materials, thoughtful proportions, and the conviction that beautiful things should age gracefully.

items.title: Landscape Architecture
items.desc: Masterplanning and site design for large-scale public spaces, parks, and resort grounds.

items.title: Garden & Balcony Design
items.desc: Bespoke residential gardens and compact balcony retreats tailored to your daily life.

items.title: Playground & Recreation
items.desc: Creative outdoor play and recreation environments that serve communities of all ages.

items.title: Resort & Hospitality
items.desc: Immersive resort landscapes that define the identity and atmosphere of a destination.

items.title: Furniture & Lighting Design
items.desc: Custom-designed objects — cabinets, tables, chairs, and lighting — born from landscape thinking.

items.name: Discovery
items.desc: Site analysis, understanding client vision, and defining the project scope.

items.name: Concept
items.desc: Developing spatial layouts, material palettes, and initial planting strategies.

items.name: Masterplanning
items.desc: Detailed architectural integration, grading, and technical documentation.

items.name: Realization
items.desc: Site supervision and bringing the natural landscape to life.

items.quote: LáMON transformed our bare rooftop into a lush, thriving ecosystem. Their attention to detail and botanical knowledge is unparalleled.
items.author: Elena V.

items.quote: The landscape design for our boutique hotel became the centerpiece of our guest experience. Simply breathtaking work.
items.author: Marcus T.

projects.title: Lumina Urban Park
projects.subtitle: Public Space Integration
projects.description: A transformative urban public park designed to foster community engagement and biodiversity with native planting and smart water strategies.

projects.title: The Obsidian Retreat
projects.subtitle: Private Residential Oasis
projects.description: An intimate residential sanctuary centered on a modern deck, integrated fire feature, and layered planting for day and night comfort.

projects.title: Skyline Serenity
projects.subtitle: Commercial Green Roof Ecosystem
projects.description: A high-performance green roof with drought-tolerant species and a minimal circulation path that improves thermal comfort and biodiversity.

projects.title: Zenith Botanical Walk
projects.subtitle: Exotic Flora Immersion
projects.description: A curated botanical pathway immersed in layered tropical species, designed for a serene and cinematic visitor journey.

projects.title: Aqua Horizon Resort
projects.subtitle: Luxury Coastal Integration
projects.description: A coastal resort landscape where pool, terrace, and planting are composed to align with horizon views and reduce erosion impacts.

projects.title: The Monolith Courtyard
projects.subtitle: Modern Corporate Campus
projects.description: A geometric corporate courtyard featuring water elements, sculptural seating, and structured planting that supports focus and recovery.

projects.title: Nghia Hiep Hung Yen Residential Quarter
projects.subtitle: High-End Residential Landscape Masterplan
projects.alt: Classical fountain plaza in Nghia Hiep Hung Yen residential area
projects.description: A premium residential landscape concept for Nghia Hiep, Hung Yen, centered on a classical fountain plaza, axial walkways, and layered planting. The design combines ceremonial architecture, warm night lighting, and human-scale seating to create an elegant neighborhood destination for gathering, strolling, and relaxation.
